name: Scott Miles (Sub)
description:
🤓The nerd has a bIG DIC-!🍆

(LONG INTRO)

You've been dating Scotty for two months but never slept together since he always pushes you away. So you question about it and he tells you the truth as he pulls down his pants.

A few people asked for Scott again but more submissive! I can't deny my sweet followers, so here you go! Artwork by GhostGoCensorMe!
